overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a cinematic horror game depicting FBI agents investigating a crime scene in a dense, foggy forest. The player character, a female FBI agent, converses with a local sheriff and her partner before proceeding deeper into the woods toward a secluded cabin.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail near crime scene investigation site

events.description: character stops walking to face the sheriff and engage in conversation
character turns and begins walking toward partner Anderson

agents.ego_description: approaching the sheriff and then walking toward partner through the forest trail

notable_agents.action: sheriff standing with hands on hips, talking to the player character

entered.detail: dense evergreen forest surrounding the path on both sides
muddy forest path covered with fallen autumn leaves
large decaying logs beside the trail
police vehicle parked among the trees in the background

segments.scene_description: The segment opens in a foggy forest with the player character approaching a local sheriff. Tall pine trees surround the muddy trail as the character stops to converse, then continues walking toward her partner visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: crime scene perimeter with police tape and evidence markers

events.description: character stops walking to engage in dialogue with partner Anderson
dialogue options appear on screen indicating interactive conversation choices

agents.ego_description: standing and discussing case details with partner near the yellow police tape

notable_agents.action: Anderson gesturing while discussing the victim and case evidence

entered.detail: stack of cut logs marking the crime scene boundary
yellow crime scene tape strung between trees blocking off the area

segments.scene_description: The character reaches her partner Anderson at a cordoned-off crime scene area. They stand near wooden logs and yellow police tape, engaging in an extended conversation about the case while the camera remains relatively stationary.

scene_state.functional_zone: dense forest path leading to secluded cabin

events.description: character turns and walks away from partner into the dense woods
emerging from dense foliage into clearing with wooden cabin visible ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through dense undergrowth toward the crime scene cabin in the distance

entered.detail: thick ferns and bushes lining both sides of the narrow path
small wooden structure with dark exterior in the forest clearing

segments.scene_description: The character leaves her partner behind and walks deeper into the forest through dense undergrowth. The path becomes narrower and more enclosed until a wooden cabin emerges into view in a clearing ahead, with other agents visible near the structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a foggy forest that transitions from an initial meeting on a muddy trail to the discovery of a secluded cabin. It begins with the player character approaching a local sheriff amidst tall pine trees before moving forward toward her partner in the distance. As the character reaches a cordoned-off crime scene, the camera lingers near wooden logs and yellow police tape during an extended conversation. The scene then shifts as the character leaves the perimeter behind, pushing through increasingly dense undergrowth and narrowing paths. Finally, the forest opens into a clearing where a wooden cabin emerges into view, surrounded by other agents.
